<a id="class-audiometadata"></a>

# AudioMetadata

**Inherits:** `RefCounted`

Right so we’re going to use MusicMetadata addon first, and then if that doesn’t work, then we’ll try our own parsing Most of this is taken from [Segfault game Engine](https://github.com/marc-rene/Segfault-Game-Engine) *(my previous game engine)* and translated from C++ to GD-Script

<a id="class-audiometadata-constant-plugin-metadata-key"></a>

**PLUGIN_METADATA_KEY** = `&"_plugin_music_metadata"` [🔗](#class-audiometadata-constant-plugin-metadata-key)

Internal key for [MusicMetadata](Audio Metadata Class.md#class-musicmetadata) instance for album art; stripped before persisting

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-audiometadata-method-extract-from-path"></a>

`Dictionary` **extract_from_path**(path: `String`)  [🔗](#class-audiometadata-method-extract-from-path)

Keys: title, artist, album, album_artist, composer, comment, genre, genres, year, bpm duration_seconds, musicbrainz_id, initial_key, plus PLUGIN_METADATA_KEY (MusicMetadata)

---

<a id="class-audiometadata-method-take-plugin-metadata"></a>

[MusicMetadata](Audio Metadata Class.md#class-musicmetadata) **take_plugin_metadata**(result: `Dictionary`)  [🔗](#class-audiometadata-method-take-plugin-metadata)

Removes and returns the embedded [MusicMetadata](Audio Metadata Class.md#class-musicmetadata) from a dict returned by [extract_from_path()](#class-audiometadata-method-extract-from-path)
